name: repo-brain
description: Three-pillar documentation architecture with sidecars and optional essays lane

interface.shortDescription: Maintain project docs, decisions, plans, and roadmap context
interface.longDescription: Repo Brain helps Codex set up, maintain, query, and act on a three-pillar documentation architecture: principles, product requirements, plans, and sidecar docs for decisions, roadmap, changelog, setup, conventions, and current state.
defaultPrompt: Set up repo-brain docs for this project.
Update the project docs from this work.
What should we work on next?
